tools.name: query_platform
tools.description: Returns structured information about the Myagi platform: current phase, milestones, conceptual model, and public roadmap.

tools.name: submit_inquiry
tools.description: Submit a contact inquiry on behalf of the calling agent's operator. Forwards to contact@myagi.bot. Returns an inquiry ID on success.

tools.name: registry_lookup
tools.description: Look up a domain's agent-readiness score in the Open Agent Registry. Proxies to /open-agent-registry/api/scan. Returns the full Profile (signals, score, label, approval_path).
